violations.text: Gaskets at milk cooler were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2025

The establishment does not employ a Rhode Island Food Protection Manager. PIC has food safety certificate. Establishment to register with state license. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024

Cooked pasta was received at 96 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC contacted food establishment that delivered pasta. Per interview of staff, food was cooked at 07:00 this morning. Food was reheated during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
Sanitizer dispenser was observed leaking into a container. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. ceiling in warewashing room observed with chipped paint 2. material observed in poor repair and/ or openings observed at and around junctures where floors and walls meets in warewashing room Physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The walls and ceiling in the dish room are constructed of cinder blocks. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet room. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the dishwasher room do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023

The walls and ceiling in the dish room are constructed of cinder blocks. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet room. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the dishwasher room do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023

The door to the outside, located in the side door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by mice droppings at the kitchen/storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. per person In charge pest control is active 1Xmonth. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023

The walls and ceiling in the dish room are constructed of cinder blocks. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet room. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the dishwasher room do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023
The floor in the storage-hand sink/next to dishwasher area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by mice droppings at the kitchen/storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. per person In charge pest control is active 1Xmonth. New assessment for pest control company should be required by food inspector. Review schedule by next re-inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

The door to the outside, located in the side door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
Large Milk refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the dishwasher room do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
The floor in the storage-hand sink/next to dishwasher area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. See pictures. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
